messages.content: Format the tool result for the user in their language. Use ONLY numbers present in the tool data. Never invent or estimate figures. Keep it concise.
pichhle mahine kitna kharch hua?
{"total_spent": 2000, "total_received": 45000, "count": 3}
Pichhle mahine aapne ₹2,000 kharch kiye aur ₹45,000 receive kiye (kul 3 transactions).

food pe kitna gaya
{"total_spent": 1200, "category": "food", "count": 1}
Food par aapne ₹1,200 kharch kiye (1 transaction).
Format the tool result for the user. Explain why the transaction failed and give next steps. Use ONLY the information in the tool data.
mera transfer fail kyun hua?

{"txn_id": "TXN002", "status": "failed", "failure_code": "BENEFICIARY_BANK_DOWN", "reason": "The beneficiary bank's systems were temporarily unavailable.", "next_steps": ["Retry after some time", "Raise a complaint if debited"], "complaint_eligible": true}

Aapka ₹5,000 ka transfer isliye fail hua kyunki beneficiary bank ke systems us waqt temporarily unavailable the. Aap thodi der baad dobara try kar sakte hain. Agar paise kat gaye the to main complaint bhi darj kar sakta hoon — kya aap chahenge?
Format the tool result for the user. Explain why the transaction failed and give next steps. Use ONLY the information in the tool data.
why did my payment fail

{"txn_id": "TXN005", "status": "failed", "failure_code": "INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS", "reason": "The account balance was lower than the transfer amount.", "next_steps": ["Add funds and retry", "Try a smaller amount"], "complaint_eligible": false}
Your payment failed because the account balance was lower than the transfer amount. You can add funds and retry, or try a smaller amount.
Format the complaint result for the user. Use ONLY the information in the tool data.
complaint kar do
{"ticket_id": "CMP1a2b3c4d", "status": "open", "sla_hours": 48}
Aapki complaint darj ho gayi hai. Ticket number hai CMP1a2b3c4d, aur ise 48 ghante ke andar resolve kiya jayega.
Format the FD booking result for the user. Use ONLY the information in the tool data.
haan confirm karo
{"booking_id": "FD9z8y7x", "status": "created", "product": "Standard FD", "amount": 100000, "tenure_months": 12, "interest_rate": 7.1}
Ho gaya! Aapki Standard FD book ho gayi hai — ₹1,00,000, 12 mahine, 7.1% interest rate. Booking ID: FD9z8y7x. Confirm karne ke liye neeche button dabayein.
Answer the user's question using ONLY the provided documentation snippets. Cite nothing outside them. If the docs don't contain the answer, say so. Answer in the user's language.
savings account kholne ke liye kya documents chahiye?

{"sources": [{"text": "To open a savings account you need: a PAN card, one proof of identity (Aadhaar, passport, or voter ID), and one proof of address. Minimum opening deposit is Rs 1000.", "source": "docs/how_to_open_savings.md"}]}
Savings account kholne ke liye aapko chahiye: PAN card, ek identity proof (Aadhaar, passport, ya voter ID), aur ek address proof. Minimum opening deposit ₹1,000 hai.
Answer the user's question using ONLY the provided documentation snippets. Cite nothing outside them. If the docs don't contain the answer, say so. Answer in the user's language.
what are the charges for not maintaining minimum balance
{"sources": [{"text": "If the average monthly balance falls below Rs 5000, a penalty of Rs 150 per month is applied to savings accounts.", "source": "docs/fees_and_charges.md"}]}
If your average monthly balance falls below ₹5,000, a penalty of ₹150 per month is applied to savings accounts.
Answer the user's question using ONLY the provided documentation snippets. Cite nothing outside them. If the docs don't contain the answer, say so. Answer in the user's language.
kya FD time se pehle todh sakte hain?
{"sources": [{"text": "Premature withdrawal of an FD is allowed but incurs a 1% penalty on the applicable interest rate.", "source": "docs/how_to_open_fd.md"}]}
Haan, FD ko time se pehle todha ja sakta hai, lekin uspar applicable interest rate par 1% penalty lagti hai.
Answer the user's question using ONLY the provided documentation snippets. Cite nothing outside them. If the docs don't contain the answer, say so. Answer in the user's language.
do you offer credit cards to students
{"sources": [{"text": "To open a savings account you need a PAN card and proof of address. Minimum balance is Rs 5000.", "source": "docs/how_to_open_savings.md"}]}
I don't have information about student credit cards in the available documents. You may want to contact customer support for details on credit card eligibility.
